welcome.title: Gardan
welcome.subtitle: Professional back-scratching services, on demand.
welcome.description: Connect with independent service providers in your area within minutes.

signup.title: Create account
signup.codeSubtitle: Enter the verification code sent to {{phone}}
signup.codeHint: For demonstration purposes, the code is 000000
signup.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
signup.errorCode: Incorrect verification code. Please try again.

avatar.title: Choose profile photo
avatar.subtitle: This photo will be shown to the other party in a transaction.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heading: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
terms.body:
Gardan is solely an intermediary platform connecting users seeking back-scratching services with users offering such services. The company does not employ scratchers, is not a party to any transaction between users, and bears no responsibility for the quality, depth, duration, or outcome of the service.

Payment for the service is made directly between users, in cash or by direct payment method, and is not processed by the platform. The platform is not a party to the payment transaction and is not responsible for its collection.

Users must exercise reasonable care and caution when meeting another user who is not personally known to them. Use of the application is subject to applicable legal age requirements and additional terms detailed in the full document.

Continued use of the application constitutes full agreement to these terms.
terms.checkbox: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
terms.disclaimer: Gardan is solely an intermediary platform and is not a party to transactions between users.

home.emptyNearby: No scratchers available in your area right now. Try expanding your radius or check again later.
home.selectPrompt: Select a scratcher from the list to get started.
home.webMapNotice: Map view is available in the mobile app. Below is the list of scratchers in your area.

waiting.title: Finding a scratcher
waiting.subtitle: Request sent to {{name}}
waiting.declinedNotice: The request was declined. Looking for another scratcher.

active.title: Active order

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: The requested page was not found.

chat.onWay: On the way to you. Arriving in about {{minutes}} minutes.
chat.starting: Starting gently. Let me know if the intensity isn't right.
chat.checkIn: Is the intensity working for you?
chat.done: Scratch completed. Thank you for your order.

chat.confirmed: Thanks for confirming, waiting for you.
chat.eta: Great, I'll update you when I arrive.
chat.thanks: Thank you, the service was excellent.
